summary: Completed testing of 4 fixes in iteration 16: 1) DateInput due date freeze fix, 2) FY-filtered account balances, 3) Custom invoice print template, 4) Searchable category/supplier dropdowns in Inventory. All tests PASSED.

issues: Console warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - this is a hydration error in the Recent Vouchers table (low priority, pre-existing from previous iterations)
Same hydration warning in inventory table (pre-existing)

critical_code_review_comments: DateInput component (date-input.jsx) correctly passes string value directly via onChange(newValue) instead of synthetic event object
SalesInvoicePage fetchParams correctly includes fy_id from selectedFY context
RemoteAccountSelector correctly passes fyId prop to /accounts/movable/list endpoint
Backend routers/invoices.py has recalculate_fy_balances helper function and fy_id param on customer-accounts and supplier-accounts
Backend routers/accounts.py has fy_id param on /accounts/movable/list endpoint
InventoryPage uses Popover+Command components for searchable category and supplier filters with data-testid attributes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 fixes all verified: DateInput freeze fix, FY-filtered balances, custom invoice print template (SalesInvoicePrint), and searchable dropdowns in Inventory page. The organization ID is fa6d4449-a859-445f-9e0b-fbb4aa90bfee, FY 2017 ID is ec0a1e9b-e0bc-433b-a5fa-059ca159b13d.

date_input_freeze_fix.details: Changed due date on Sales Invoice form - page remained responsive. DateInput onChange now passes string value directly.

fy_filtered_balances_customer_accounts.details: GET /api/customer-accounts?organization_id=X&fy_id=Y returns accounts with FY-filtered balances

fy_filtered_balances_supplier_accounts.details: GET /api/supplier-accounts?organization_id=X&fy_id=Y returns accounts with FY-filtered balances

fy_filtered_balances_movable_accounts.details: GET /api/accounts/movable/list?organization_id=X&fy_id=Y returns accounts with FY-filtered balances

sales_invoice_print_template.details: SalesInvoicePrint component is correctly imported and used in both SalesInvoicePage and SalesReturnPage. handlePrint calls printInvoice() to open bilingual template.

inventory_category_search.details: Category filter dropdown in Inventory page has search input (Popover+Command combobox with data-testid='category-filter')

inventory_supplier_search.details: Supplier filter dropdown in Inventory page has search input (Popover+Command combobox with data-testid='supplier-filter')

crdb_notes_fy_filter.details: RemoteAccountSelector in CrDbNotesPage passes fyId={selectedFY?.id} prop to /accounts/movable/list endpoint
